name: Renwei Meng
headline: Researcher building reliable product systems
bio: I focus on AI systems, product engineering, and information design, translating research into clear user experiences.

education.description: Built a strong foundation in algorithms, computer vision, and machine learning, while leading research-oriented engineering projects.
achievements: Team Lead for a National College Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition

detail.schoolIntro: Anhui University is a Double First-Class university with strong emphasis on innovation, engineering practice, and interdisciplinary learning.
detail.majorIntro: Digital Media Technology combines computer science, interactive systems, and intelligent media engineering to build both technical depth and creative capability.
awards: Provincial First Prize, China Undergraduate Mathematical Contest in Modeling
Honorable Mention, Mathematical Contest in Modeling / Interdisciplinary Contest in Modeling
Provincial Second Prize, Lanqiao Cup Java Track
volunteering: Volunteer Service for the 12355 Youth Service Platform
Community outreach volunteer activity with Anhui Meishan Public Welfare Foundation

internships.company: Taiyuan Longwei Electronic Technology Co., Ltd.
internships.summary: Contributed to backend API development and database management, and helped deliver stable RESTful APIs for frontend integration.

detail.companyIntro: The company focuses on electronic technology and enterprise software systems, delivering stable engineering solutions for real business scenarios.
detail.roleIntro: Worked as a Java backend development intern on API implementation, database management, and backend-frontend integration under a Spring Boot and MyBatis stack.
highlights: Developed backend interfaces and managed databases using Spring Boot and MyBatis.
Collaborated with the frontend team to design and implement RESTful APIs, improving data transmission efficiency and system stability.

internships.company: State Grid Shanxi Electric Power Company
internships.summary: Supported daily operations of the electric power platform and analyzed operational data to assist system optimization.

detail.companyIntro: State Grid Shanxi Electric Power Company operates critical regional power infrastructure, where platform reliability, availability, and operational insight are essential.
detail.roleIntro: Worked as a systems operations intern on daily platform maintenance, operational support, and data analysis for reliability improvement.
highlights: Participated in the daily operations and maintenance of the power system platform to ensure stable operation of critical systems.
Analyzed operational data and produced monthly reports to support system optimization.

music.title: Musician
music.intro: I am a drummer, and I also play guitar and piano. I compose music as well.

timeline.title: Mathematical Foundations and Programming Training
timeline.description: Built a rigorous foundation in calculus, linear algebra, probability, and statistics while completing structured programming training to establish computational thinking and engineering discipline.

timeline.title: Advanced CS Coursework and Full-Stack Foundations
timeline.description: Moved into core computer science study, including data structures and systems knowledge, while systematically learning Java backend development and HTML/CSS/JavaScript frontend engineering.

timeline.title: Research in Medical Imaging and Computer Vision
timeline.description: Joined a research group to work on coronary CTA artifact reduction, focusing on the intersection of medical imaging, computer vision, and real-world scientific problems.

timeline.title: Exploration of Software Vulnerability Detection
timeline.description: Expanded into software security research, improving vulnerability detection methods with emphasis on code representation, defect pattern modeling, and detection effectiveness.

timeline.title: Deep Dive into LLM Systems and Agent Architectures
timeline.description: Studied large language model systems in depth, with focus on RAG enhancement, reasoning-chain optimization, agent workflow orchestration, and deployable intelligent agent pipelines.

timeline.title: Modern Full-Stack Engineering and Distributed Architectures
timeline.description: Strengthened practical command of modern stacks such as React and FastAPI, while extending into microservices, distributed systems, and production-grade architecture design.

timeline.title: Expansion into EEG BCI and AIGC Authenticity Research
timeline.description: Advanced further in EEG-based brain-computer interface research while also focusing on AIGC authenticity detection and multimodal AI safety at the frontier of cross-disciplinary research.
